Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Petition for Approval of Compromise of a Person with a Disability.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Arnold I. Berscher, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Jenny Po Wah Yu, aka Jenny P.W. Yu.
Petitioner and Guardian ad Litem adult daughter sworn and examinded.
Seth J. Schwartz, Esq., appearing for Defendant.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement in the amount of $1,000,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $180,000.00 payable to Berscher Associates PC.
Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitioner's attorney in the total amount of $3,961.02
Medical, hospital, ambulance, nursing, and other like expenses payable directly to providers as follows, in the total amount of: $200,000.00, payable to KAISER CALIFORNIA NORTH.

A net balance of $616,038,98 to be drawn upon the IOLTA [trust] account (Wells Fargo No. 3367602954) maintained by Berschler associates, PC/Arnold I. Berschler to the order of Fremont Bank, Trustee, of SNT for Judy Yu, forthwith upon Fremont Bank deand therefor.
Arnold I. Berschler to maintain $616,038.98 in IOLTA account, abovesaid, until demand for such to be issued ot he trustee of SNT for Judy Yu under Action No. PTR-13-296-495.

Court signed Order Granting approval of Compromise.
Status Hearing Scheduled on June 6, 2013 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into special Needs Trust and Approval of Special Needs Trust by Probate Court. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
